description_long: This rifle features a classic design with a wooden stock and a long, slender black barrel. The stock is smooth and ergonomically shaped, providing a comfortable grip and shoulder rest. The receiver and trigger assembly are metallic, with a bolt-action mechanism visible on the side. The rifle is equipped with simple iron sights, with no scope or advanced optics attached. The magazine is internal, seamlessly integrated into the body, and the muzzle is plain with no visible attachments. The overall finish is a combination of polished wood and matte black metal, giving it a traditional and utilitarian appearance.
description: A traditional bolt-action rifle with a wooden stock, long black barrel, and iron sights. The design is simple, with a smooth wood finish and matte metal components.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, highlighting the wooden stock, long barrel, and bolt-action mechanism.
description_view_1: Top-down view emphasizing the slim profile of the barrel and the alignment of the iron sights.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the wooden stock, barrel, and trigger area, mirroring the first side but with less detail on the bolt.
description_view_3: Bottom-up view showing the underside of the stock and barrel, with the trigger guard and magazine area visible.
